attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 RU_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ,
  PRODUCT_KEY, 
  COALESCE(BK_DEAL_ID , ' '),
  ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD ,
  COALESCE(FT,'N') LINE_FT_FLG,
  COALESCE(LTM,'N') LINE_LTM_FLG,
  COALESCE(VOLUME,'N') LINE_VOLUME_PP_FLG,
  COALESCE(CISCO_START,'N') LINE_CISCO_START_FLG ,
  COALESCE(OTH_PP,'N') AS LINE_OTH_PP_FLG,
  COALESCE(VOLUME_BR,'N') LINE_VOLUME_BR_FLG,
  COALESCE(XIP,'N') LINE_XIP_FLG,
  COALESCE(K12,'N') LINE_K12_FLG,
  COALESCE(OTH_BR,'N') LINE_OTH_BR_FLG,
  COALESCE(DEAL_VOLUME_BR,'N') DEAL_VOLUME_BR_FLG,
  COALESCE(DEAL_XIP,'N') DEAL_XIP_FLG,
  COALESCE(DEAL_K12,'N')DEAL_K12_FLG,
  COALESCE(DEAL_OTH_BR,'N') DEAL_OTH_BR_FLG,
  COALESCE(CONTRACT,'N') CONTRACT_FLG,
  RTM AS DV_RTM_CD,
  COALESCE(VOLUME_FLAG ,'N') VOLUME_FLG,
  PROMOTION_1_CD  DV_PROMOTION_1_CD,
  PROMOTION_2_CD  DV_PROMOTION_2_CD,
PROMOTION_3_CD  DV_PROMOTION_3_CD,
PROMOTION_4_CD  DV_PROMOTION_4_CD,
PROMOTION_5_CD  DV_PROMOTION_5_CD,
PROMOTION_6_CD  DV_PROMOTION_6_CD,
PROMOTION_7_CD  DV_PROMOTION_7_CD,
PROMOTION_8_CD  DV_PROMOTION_8_CD,
  DEAL_PROMOTION_1_CD DV_DEAL_PROMOTION_1_CD,
  DEAL_PROMOTION_2_CD DV_DEAL_PROMOTION_2_CD,
  DEAL_PROMOTION_3_CD DV_DEAL_PROMOTION_3_CD,
  DEAL_PROMOTION_4_CD DV_DEAL_PROMOTION_4_CD,
  DEAL_PROMOTION_5_CD DV_DEAL_PROMOTION_5_CD,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
  USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
  USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
  COALESCE(DEAL_OIP_FLG,'N') DEAL_OIP_FLG,
  'N' AS DV_OIPX_FLG,
  PROGRAM  DV_PROGRAM_CD,
  "DEAL_SOURCE",
CASE WHEN RTM  LIKE 'DID NSD%' THEN ':DID NSD DEAL' ELSE PROGRAM_NAME END PROGRAM_NAME
  FROM (
SELECT 
   QUOTES.RU_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ,
  QUOTES. PRODUCT_KEY, 
    QUOTES. BK_DEAL_ID , 
  QUOTES. ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD ,
   CASE
WHEN TRIM(DEAL_TYPE) = '1' THEN 'SFDC'
WHEN TRIM(DEAL_TYPE) = '2' THEN 'MDM'
WHEN TRIM(DEAL_TYPE) ='3'  THEN 'PDR'
WHEN TRIM(DEAL_TYPE) ='5'  THEN 'MDM'
ELSE 'MDM' END  AS "DEAL_SOURCE",
PRO.PROGRAM_NAME,
  /*Line Level PP*/
  MAX(CASE WHEN LINE_PRICING.PROGRAM_GROUP_NAME = 'FT' THEN 'Y' END) FT,
  MAX(CASE WHEN LINE_PRICING.PROGRAM_GROUP_NAME = 'LTM' THEN 'Y' END)  LTM,
  MAX(CASE WHEN LINE_PRICING.PROGRAM_GROUP_NAME = 'VOLUME' THEN 'Y' END)  VOLUME,
  MAX(CASE WHEN LINE_PRICING.PROGRAM_GROUP_NAME ='CISCO START'  THEN 'Y' END) CISCO_START,
/*  MAX(CASE WHEN LINE_PRICING.PROGRAM_GROUP_NAME = 'FT' AND QUOTES.DV_PROMOTION_CD LIKE'PP%' THEN 'Y' END) FT,
  MAX(CASE WHEN LINE_PRICING.PROGRAM_GROUP_NAME = 'LTM' THEN 'Y' END)  LTM,
  MAX(CASE WHEN LINE_PRICING.PROGRAM_GROUP_NAME = 'VOLUME' AND QUOTES.DV_PROMOTION_CD LIKE'PP%' THEN 'Y' END)  VOLUME,
  MAX(CASE WHEN LINE_PRICING.PROGRAM_GROUP_NAME ='CISCO START' AND QUOTES.DV_PROMOTION_CD LIKE'PP%'  THEN 'Y' END) CISCO_START,*/
  MAX(CASE WHEN COALESCE(LINE_PRICING.PROGRAM_GROUP_NAME,'X') NOT IN ('FT ', 'LTM', 'CISCO START', 'VOLUME') AND QUOTES.DV_PROMOTION_CD LIKE 'PP%' AND QUOTES.DV_PROMOTION_CD <> 'PP-NONE' THEN 'Y' END) OTH_PP, 
  /*Line Level BR*/
  MAX(CASE WHEN LINE_PRICING.PROGRAM_GROUP_NAME ='VOLUME' AND  QUOTES.DV_PROMOTION_CD LIKE'BR%' then 'Y' end)  VOLUME_BR,
  MAX(CASE WHEN LINE_PRICING.PROGRAM_GROUP_NAME IN ('OIP', 'SIP', 'TIP') THEN 'Y' END) XIP,
MAX(CASE WHEN QUOTES.DV_PROMOTION_CD LIKE 'BR-K12%' THEN 'Y' END) K12,
  MAX(CASE WHEN COALESCE(QUOTES.DV_PROGRAM_CD,'X') NOT IN ( 'OIP', 'SIP', 'TIP', 'VOLUME') AND QUOTES.DV_PROMOTION_CD LIKE 'BR%' THEN 'Y' END) OTH_BR,
  /*DEAL LEVEL*/
  MAX(CASE WHEN DEAL_PRICING.PROGRAM_GROUP_NAME = 'VOLUME' then 'Y' end) DEAL_VOLUME_BR,
  MAX(CASE WHEN DEAL_PRICING.PROGRAM_GROUP_NAME IN ('OIP', 'SIP', 'TIP') THEN 'Y' END) DEAL_XIP,
    MAX(CASE WHEN DEAL_PRICING.PROGRAM_GROUP_NAME ='OIP' THEN 'Y' END) DEAL_OIP_FLG,
  MAX(CASE WHEN QUOTES.DV_DEAL_PROMOTION_CD LIKE 'BR-K12%' THEN 'Y' END) DEAL_K12,
  MAX(CASE WHEN COALESCE(QUOTES.DV_DEAL_PROGRAM_CD,'X') NOT IN ( 'OIP', 'SIP', 'TIP', 'VOLUME') AND  QUOTES.DV_DEAL_PROMOTION_CD LIKE 'BR%' THEN 'Y' END) DEAL_OTH_BR,
  /*CONTRATUAL DISCOUNT*/
  MAX(CASE WHEN QUOTES.DV_PROMOTION_CD LIKE 'CD-%' OR QUOTES.DV_PROMOTION_CD LIKE 'PCON-%' OR QUOTES.DV_DEAL_PROMOTION_CD LIKE 'CD-%' OR QUOTES.DV_DEAL_PROMOTION_CD LIKE 'PCON-%'
  OR QUOTES.DV_PROMOTION_CD ='CONTRACT' OR QUOTES.DV_DEAL_PROMOTION_CD = 'CONTRACT' THEN 'Y' END) CONTRACT,
  /*DV_SOURCE_CD*/
  COALESCE(
     MAX(CASE WHEN DV_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'QUOTE %' AND QUOTES.DV_PROMOTION_CD= 'NON STANDARD OTHER' THEN 'DID NSD LINE' END),
     MAX(CASE WHEN DV_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'QUOTE %' AND QUOTES.DV_DEAL_PROMOTION_CD= 'NON STANDARD OTHER' THEN 'DID NSD DEAL' END),
     MAX(CASE WHEN DV_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'QUOTE %' THEN 'DID STANDARD' END),
     MAX(DV_SOURCE_CD)
  ) RTM,
  SUBSTR( min(substr('    ' || cast(COALESCE(DEAL_PRICING.PRIORITY_INT, LINE_PRICING.PRIORITY_INT) as varchar(10)), characters(cast(COALESCE(DEAL_PRICING.PRIORITY_INT, LINE_PRICING.PRIORITY_INT) as varchar(10)))+1,4) || COALESCE(DEAL_PRICING.BK_PROGRAM_NAME, LINE_PRICING.BK_PROGRAM_NAME)) ,5,100) PROGRAM,
  case when 
       (
         RTM is null or RTM = 'FT in WPL' or RTM = 'WPL' or
         LTM is not null and RTM not in ('DID NSD Line','DID NSD Deal') or
         RTM in ('Manual Claim','Net Country','DSV Booking','Claim Auth No','CSCC QUOTE') and 
           NOT(FT is null and 
           LTM is null and 
           VOLUME is null and 
          /* K12 is null and*/
           OTH_PP is null and 
           VOLUME_BR is null and 
           XIP is null and 
           OTH_BR is null and 
           DEAL_VOLUME_BR is null and
           CISCO_START is null) or
         RTM = 'DID Standard' and DEAL_VOLUME_BR is not null
       )  then 'Y' end VOLUME_FLAG,
                                /*case when RTM in ('Claim Auth No','DSV Booking','Manual Claim','Net Country','FT in WPL','WPL') OR
                                RTM = 'DID Standard' AND (LTM is not null OR DEAL_VOLUME_BR is not null) then 'Y' end VOLUME_FLAG,*/
/*LINE LEVEL PROMOTION*/
MIN(CASE WHEN DV_PROMOTION_CD IS NOT NULL AND DV_SEQ_INT=1 THEN DV_PROMOTION_CD END) PROMOTION_1_CD,
MIN(CASE WHEN DV_PROMOTION_CD IS NOT NULL AND DV_SEQ_INT=2 THEN DV_PROMOTION_CD END) PROMOTION_2_CD,
MIN(CASE WHEN DV_PROMOTION_CD IS NOT NULL AND DV_SEQ_INT=3 THEN DV_PROMOTION_CD END) PROMOTION_3_CD,
MIN(CASE WHEN DV_PROMOTION_CD IS NOT NULL AND DV_SEQ_INT=4 THEN DV_PROMOTION_CD END) PROMOTION_4_CD,
MIN(CASE WHEN DV_PROMOTION_CD IS NOT NULL AND DV_SEQ_INT=5 THEN DV_PROMOTION_CD END) PROMOTION_5_CD,
MIN(CASE WHEN DV_PROMOTION_CD IS NOT NULL AND DV_SEQ_INT=6 THEN DV_PROMOTION_CD END) PROMOTION_6_CD,
MIN(CASE WHEN DV_PROMOTION_CD IS NOT NULL AND DV_SEQ_INT=7 THEN DV_PROMOTION_CD END) PROMOTION_7_CD,
MIN(CASE WHEN DV_PROMOTION_CD IS NOT NULL AND DV_SEQ_INT=8 THEN DV_PROMOTION_CD END) PROMOTION_8_CD,
/*DEAL LEVEL PROMOTION*/
MIN(CASE WHEN DV_DEAL_PROMOTION_CD IS NOT NULL AND DV_SEQ_INT=1 THEN DV_DEAL_PROMOTION_CD END) DEAL_PROMOTION_1_CD,
MIN(CASE WHEN DV_DEAL_PROMOTION_CD IS NOT NULL AND DV_SEQ_INT=2 THEN DV_DEAL_PROMOTION_CD END) DEAL_PROMOTION_2_CD,
MIN(CASE WHEN DV_DEAL_PROMOTION_CD IS NOT NULL AND DV_SEQ_INT=3 THEN DV_DEAL_PROMOTION_CD END) DEAL_PROMOTION_3_CD,
MIN(CASE WHEN DV_DEAL_PROMOTION_CD IS NOT NULL AND DV_SEQ_INT=4 THEN DV_DEAL_PROMOTION_CD END) DEAL_PROMOTION_4_CD,
MIN(CASE WHEN DV_DEAL_PROMOTION_CD IS NOT NULL AND DV_SEQ_INT=5 THEN DV_DEAL_PROMOTION_CD END) DEAL_PROMOTION_5_CD
FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_APJ_PRC_CLAIMS_QUOTE  QUOTES
LEFT JOIN $$APJPDATAVWDB.N_APSP_WW_PROMOTION_PROGRAM  LINE_PRICING
ON  LINE_PRICING.BK_PROGRAM_NAME=QUOTES.DV_PROGRAM_CD
LEFT JOIN  $$APJPDATAVWDB.N_APSP_WW_PROMOTION_PROGRAM  DEAL_PRICING
ON  DEAL_PRICING.BK_PROGRAM_NAME=QUOTES.DV_DEAL_PROGRAM_CD
LEFT JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL DEAL
ON DEAL.BK_DEAL_ID=QUOTES.BK_DEAL_ID
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_APJ_PRC_PROGRAMS  PRO
ON QUOTES.RU_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=PRO.RU_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT AND 
  QUOTES.BK_DEAL_ID=PRO.BK_DEAL_ID AND 
QUOTES.PRODUCT_KEY=PRO.PRODUCT_KEY 
AND QUOTES.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD=PRO.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6
)PROMO
